competitor_changes: Multi-currency invoicing with 80+ currencies including EUR, GBP, USD native
Global payment rails (SWIFT, SEPA, Faster Payments)
Real-time bank feeds (Barclays, HSBC via Open Banking API)
Audit trail export: PDF with digital signature
24/7 support SLA with dedicated success manager
current_tool_status: Reconciliation on datasets >5,000 rows takes 8–12 minutes; causes month-end bottleneck
Revenue recognition module not IFRS 15 compliant — workaround in use
No real-time bank feed for Barclays Business accounts (only overnight sync)
Audit trail export is CSV only — external auditors have requested PDF with digital signature
compliance_changes: UK data residency not available; SOC2 certification in progress; no self-serve EU data residency roadmap confirmed
notes: UK clients may not be able to use PayTrek due to non-compliance with Meridian's UK GDPR obligations for EU client data
EU clients with data sovereignty requirements cannot be served
